articles.title: Fed's Miran: I would pencil in 3 rate cuts this year versus 4 before the war
articles.expand: Miran is a joke and is only there to take orders from the White House but even he can't ignore the oil shock and its impact on inflation. So he says he would now pencil in 3 cuts this year compared to 4 previously. That's a sign of which way the wind is blowing and you can see that in the curve, where the market now sees 10 bps of easing this year ...

articles.expand: New York Fed President John Williams warned that rising energy prices are already feeding into inflation, as the Iran War pushed up costs across the economy.
